data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Source code read — merge-state.sh (library), 7 consumers identified: pre-commit-review-gate.sh, pre-commit-test-gate.sh, record-test-status.sh, compute-diff-hash.sh, capture-review-diff.sh, review-complexity-classifier.sh, merge-to-main.sh. Existing unit tests: test-merge-state.sh (15 tests). Integration test to create: tests/hooks/test-merge-state-golden-path.sh (5 scenarios x 7 consumers = 35+ tests) ✓
